info.title: smolfleet API
info.description: Control plane for smolvm — deploy and run machines across a cluster.

tenantId.description:
Tenant to scope this key to (admin only). Keys created with a tenant_id
can only access resources belonging to that tenant.

oneOf.description: Replace instances in batches. Each batch: start new → health check → destroy old.

useHealthCheck.description: Wait for health check to pass before destroying old instances.

waitSeconds.description: Seconds to wait between batches if not using health checks (default: 5).

oneOf.description:
Deploy N canary instances first. If healthy, replace the rest.
If canaries fail, roll back without touching existing instances.

autoPromote.description: Auto-promote after health check passes. If false, requires manual promotion.

canaryCount.description: Number of canary instances to deploy (default: 1).

oneOf.description:
Deploy a complete new set alongside the old. Switch traffic atomically,
then destroy old instances.

runtime.description:
The runtime this node speaks (e.g. `"smolvm"`). The control plane resolves
a driver from this name; `smolvm_address` is that runtime's endpoint.
Defaults to `"smolvm"` so a node that doesn't report a runtime (the only
runtime today) is handled transparently.

smolvmAddress.description: The runtime endpoint (HTTP address) on this node.

usedCpus.description:
Real CPU usage as fractional CPUs (e.g., 2.5 = 2.5 CPUs worth of load).
Reported by the node from hypervisor/process stats. Separate from
`available_cpus` (which is allocation-based bookkeeping).

usedDiskGb.description:
Real disk space consumed by VM overlay/storage files in GB. Reported
from filesystem stat of VM disk images. Separate from
`available_disk_gb` (which reflects the entire host filesystem).

usedMemoryMb.description:
Real memory usage in MB. Reported by the node from RSS of VM processes.
Separate from `available_memory_mb` (which is allocation-based bookkeeping).

tenantId.description:
Optional owning tenant. Admin-only: when set, the pool is private to that
tenant; when omitted, the pool is shared and any tenant may claim from it.
